All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

S

saveDataRecordsToCsv(String, List<DataRecord>) - Static method in class app.util.CsvStorageService
Saves a list of historical pricing data records into a dedicated CSV file.
saveIndicatorsToCsv(String, Instant, int, FinancialIndicators) - Static method in class app.util.CsvStorageService
Logs calculated indicator parameters into a designated technical indicators tracking CSV file.
ScrollablePanel - Class in app.gui.components
A JPanel extension that implements the Scrollable interface to provide specialized viewport behaviors when embedded inside a JScrollPane.
ScrollablePanel(LayoutManager) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.ScrollablePanel
Constructs a new ScrollablePanel using the designated layout manager.
searchData(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Method in class app.controller.Controller
Validates the provided date range and fetches financial data for a specific asset and granularity.
searchForAnomaly(String, LocalDateTime, String) - Method in class app.controller.Controller
Performs anomaly detection on the active dataset.
searchForAnomaly(IsolationForest, List<DataRecord>, double) - Method in interface app.service.AnomaliesDetectionService
Evaluates a list of target financial records against a trained Isolation Forest model to identify data points that exceed the specified abnormality threshold.
searchForAnomaly(IsolationForest, List<DataRecord>, double) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseAnomaliesDetectionService
Evaluates a collection of active target financial records against the specified pre-trained model to identify elements exceeding the anomaly threshold.
searchForAnomaly(IsolationForest, List<DataRecord>, double) - Method in class app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService
Scores target records through the same quantum feature map used during training.
SearchPanel - Class in app.gui.views
An analytical configuration form panel handling historical asset metadata ingestion criteria.
SearchPanel(MainPage) - Constructor for class app.gui.views.SearchPanel
Constructs a SearchPanel, configuring selection widgets and mapping grid layout parameters.
sendRequest(HttpRequest.Builder) - Method in class app.client.ApiClient
Builds and sends an HTTP request synchronously, handles the response, manages logs, and processes any network or business logic exceptions.
setCharts(List<JFreeChart>) - Method in class app.gui.components.DynamicChartContainer
Updates the collection of charts managed by this container.
setSelected(boolean) - Method in class app.gui.components.MenuTabButton
Alters the structural validation selection state, updating look-and-feel constraints.
SHADOW - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The soft charcoal tone matching drop shadow border layers to create container depth.
StyledBarChart - Class in app.gui.components
A customized bar chart implementation that inherits core styling from StyledChart.
StyledBarChart(String, String, String, IntervalXYDataset) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.StyledBarChart
Constructs a styled bar chart with time-series data intervals.
StyledChart - Class in app.gui.components
An abstract base class for customized JFreeChart charts within the application.
StyledChart(String, XYPlot) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.StyledChart
Constructs a new StyledChart with a specific title and plot configuration, and automatically applies the corporate styling rules.
StyledChartPanel - Class in app.gui.components
A Swing GUI component container for holding and displaying JFreeChart objects.
StyledChartPanel(JFreeChart) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.StyledChartPanel
Constructs a new StyledChartPanel containing the specified chart.
StyledLineChart - Class in app.gui.components
A customized line chart implementation that inherits core styling from StyledChart.
StyledLineChart(String, String, String, XYDataset) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.StyledLineChart
Constructs a styled line chart for time-series data.
SUCCESS - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
Semantic feedback color signaling successful processes or normal operational boundaries.
SUCCESS_MESSAGE - Static variable in class app.gui.components.FloatingMessage
Success notification type classification flag.
